title: July 2018 Back Page – Celebrating Emil Henry:
summary: Emil Henry Sr.—better known as Alu —retired June 3. He worked for AVEC in Kiana, then in Ambler and then back in Kiana for 38 years. Emil had an incredible record of keeping the lights on! Emil started with AVEC in Kiana in September 1980. He and his family moved to Ambler in 1997 because his wife w...

title: Indian City
summary: July 2, 2018 From the band Indian City, the album Here and Now is a folk/pop celebration of generations of Indigenous music on Canada’s 150th anniversary. Vince Fontaine and a collective of musicians coming out of Winnipeg, Manitoba became Indian City in 2012 to represent cultural issues through mus...
